description: [Deprecated] Local multi-cloud simulator (AWS/GCP/Azure) with real backends — full SDK + CLI parity for boto3, aws-cli, google-cloud-*, azure-sdk-*, Terraform. — install 'vyomi' instead. The 'cloud-learn' Scoop alias will be removed in v3.0.
post_install: Write-Host 'Note: `cloud-learn` is deprecated. The new canonical install is `scoop install vyomi`.' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host '      Both packages install the same binary; the cloud-learn alias is slated for removal in v3.0.' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host '==> Run `cloud-learn up` to start the simulator (still works during transition).' -ForegroundColor Green

script: Write-Host '==> Stopping appliance VM (if running)...' -ForegroundColor Yellow

notes: CloudLearn ships as an appliance — the launcher runs a single Multipass VM and starts the full simulator stack (FastAPI + 8 real backends + Java CloudSim) inside.
Prerequisites (the launcher auto-installs Multipass on first `vyomi up`; you also need):
- ~32 GB free disk for VM image + container layers
cloud-learn up               # boots VM + simulator (5-10 min first run)
Start http://192.168.x.x:9000   # URL printed in the launcher banner
